title: cornukaempferia longipetiolata
intro: Cornukaempferia longipetiolata, also known as Kluai Khai, is a type of plant species in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cornukaempferia longipetiolata include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cornukaempferia longipetiolata are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
